Part 1: Income.label: Wages and Salaries
Part 1: Income.description: Gross monthly wages and salaries.

Part 1: Income.label: Interest and Dividend Income
Part 1: Income.description: Monthly income from interest and dividends.

Part 1: Income.label: Business Income
Part 1: Income.description: Monthly gross income from business or self-employment.

Part 1: Income.label: Maintenance Received
Part 1: Income.description: Monthly alimony or maintenance received from other actions.

Part 1: Income.label: Other Income
Part 1: Income.description: Any other sources of monthly gross income.

Part 1: Income.label: Imputed Income
Part 1: Income.description: Income imputed to a parent who is voluntarily unemployed or underemployed.

Part 1: Income.label: Total Gross Monthly Income
Part 1: Income.description: Total of lines 1a through 1f.

Part 1: Income.label: Income Taxes (Federal and State)
Part 1: Income.description: Monthly federal and state income tax deductions.

Part 1: Income.label: FICA / Self-Employment Taxes
Part 1: Income.description: Social Security and Medicare taxes.

Part 1: Income.label: Mandatory State Deductions
Part 1: Income.description: Mandatory state insurance premiums, paid family leave, and WA Cares premiums.

Part 1: Income.label: State Industrial Insurance Deductions
Part 1: Income.description: Worker's compensation / L&I deductions.

Part 1: Income.label: Mandatory Union/Professional Dues
Part 1: Income.description: Mandatory dues required for employment.

Part 1: Income.label: Mandatory Pension Plan Payments
Part 1: Income.description: Required contributions to a pension plan.

Part 1: Income.label: Voluntary Retirement Contributions
Part 1: Income.description: Voluntary retirement contributions (up to certain limits).

Part 1: Income.label: Maintenance Paid
Part 1: Income.description: Alimony or maintenance paid to others.

Part 1: Income.label: Normal Business Expenses
Part 1: Income.description: Ordinary and necessary business expenses for self-employed parents.

Part 1: Income.label: Total Deductions from Gross Income
Part 1: Income.description: Total of lines 2a through 2i.

Part 1: Income.label: Monthly Net Income
Part 1: Income.description: Gross monthly income minus total monthly deductions (Line 1g - 2j).

Part 1: Income.label: Combined Monthly Net Income
Part 1: Income.description: Sum of both parents' monthly net incomes.

Part 1: Income.label: Number of children
Part 1: Income.description: Total number of children in the current action.

Part 1: Income.label: Basic Support Per Child
Part 1: Income.description: The amount per child from the Economic Table based on Combined Net Income.

Part 1: Income.label: Basic Child Support Obligation
Part 1: Income.description: Total calculated basic support (Number of children x Amount per child).

Part 1: Income.label: Proportional Share of Income
Part 1: Income.description: Each parent's share of the combined net income (Line 3 divided by Line 4).

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Basic Obligation (No limitations)
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: Each parent's share of the basic obligation (Line 5 multiplied by Line 6).

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Self-Support Reserve
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: 180% of the federal poverty guideline for a one-person family.

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Presumptive Minimum ($2,200 Combined)
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: Presumptive $50 per child per month if combined net income is less than $2,200.

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Self-Support Reserve Limit (Individual)
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: Presumptive $50 per child per month if parent's net income is less than self-support reserve.

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Self-Support Reserve Adjustment
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: Adjusted support if net income allows for self-support reserve.

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Other Children Adjustment
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: Adjustment for other biological or legal children.

Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.label: Basic Support Obligation (After Limitations)
Part 2: Basic Child Support Obligation.description: Final basic support after applying low-income limitations.

Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.label: Health Insurance Premiums Paid for Child(ren)
Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.description: Monthly premium cost for children's insurance.

Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.label: Education Expenses
Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.description: Tuition or other monthly educational costs. (Note: Post-secondary support is not included in the standard calculation).

Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.label: Other Special Expenses
Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.description: Other agreed-upon special child rearing expenses.

Part 3: Healthcare, Daycare & Education.label: Combined Monthly Daycare and Special Expenses

Part 4: Gross Child Support Obligation.label: Gross Child Support Obligation
Part 4: Gross Child Support Obligation.description: Final basic support (Line 9) plus share of special expenses (Line 14).

Part 5: Child Support Credits.label: Monthly Healthcare Expenses Credit
Part 5: Child Support Credits.description: Credit for healthcare expenses actually paid.

Part 5: Child Support Credits.label: Daycare and Special Expenses Credit
Part 5: Child Support Credits.description: Credit for daycare/special expenses actually paid.

Part 5: Child Support Credits.label: Other Ordinary Expenses Credit
Part 5: Child Support Credits.description: Credit for other ordinary expenses paid by the source/non-custodial parent.

Part 6: Standard Calculation & Presumpti.label: Standard Calculation
Part 6: Standard Calculation & Presumpti.description: Gross obligation minus credits (Line 15 - 16d). Presumptive minimum $50 per child per month applies.

Part 7: Additional Informational Factors.label: 45% of Net Income Limit
Part 7: Additional Informational Factors.description: 45 percent of the parent's monthly net income (reference check).

Part 7: Additional Informational Factors.label: 25% of Basic Support Obligation
Part 7: Additional Informational Factors.description: 25 percent of the basic support obligation (Line 9 reference check).

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Real Estate Value
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Estimated present value of real estate assets.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Investments Value
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Value of stocks, bonds, and other investments.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Vehicles and Boats Value
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Current market value of vehicles and boats.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Retirement Accounts Value
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Total value of retirement funds (IRA, 401k, etc.).

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Household Debt
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Liens, extraordinary debt, and major liabilities.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Income of Current Spouse/Partner
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Monthly gross income of a non-parent spouse or domestic partner.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Income of Other Adults In Household
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Income from other non-dependents in the home.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Excluded Overtime/Second Job Income
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Income requested for exclusion per guidelines.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Income of Child(ren)
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Extraordinary income of the child(ren) being considered.

Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.label: Monthly Child Support for Other Children
Part 8: Additional Factors for Court.description: Legal support child paid for children not in this action.
